## Existing Code Insights

### Reusable Assets
- `app.py` for backend entry point, `ui/` for frontend.

### Established Patterns
- Python PEP8 conventions.
- Flask for endpoints and SSE.
- Object-oriented encapsulation class patterns in JS (`window.app`, `window.billboardApp`).

### Integration Points
- Connecting Flask with KuzuDB in local directory.
